reasoning.research_depth: Solid personal finance research with good sourcing. Accessible without being superficial.
reasoning.signal_noise: Good content structure with clear explanations. Animation and graphics support the message well with minimal filler.
reasoning.originality: Well-executed personal finance education. The couple format and animation style are distinctive but the genre is crowded.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Good evergreen value for personal finance fundamentals. Core financial literacy concepts remain relevant over time.
